betterquesting:10.desc:8:
The §6Space Suit Chest-Piece§f is the §6core armor piece§f in the AR progression — without it, the player cannot survive in vacuum, on airless moons, or in unbreathable atmospheres. The chest-piece provides §6oxygen§f, §6pressure sealing§f, and §6thermal regulation§f to the player when worn with the full suit set.

§6Production Path (spacechestplate.json)§f:
- Type: §6minecraft:crafting_shaped§f
- Pattern (3×3):
  ```
  w r w
  w t w
  w f w
  ```
- Key: `w`=§6minecraft:wool:32767§f (any wool color), `r`=§6stickIron§f (forge:ore_dict), `t`=§6advancedrocketry:fueltank§f (Monopropellant Fuel Tank, quest 10027), `f`=§6fanSteel§f (forge:ore_dict)
- Output: 1x §6Space Suit Chest-Piece§f (advancedrocketry:spacechestplate)

The chest-piece provides:
- §610 minutes§f of oxygen (refilled at a §6Gas Charge Pad§f chain)
- §6Pressure sealing§f in vacuum (prevents suffocation damage)
- §6Thermal protection§f in extreme temperatures
- §6Knockback resistance§f from rocket exhaust

The chest-piece is crafted at the §6Suit Workstation§f (10048). The full suit set (helmet, chest, legs, boots) is required for vacuum operations — partial sets do not provide pressure sealing.

The space suit is the prerequisite for the §6Atmosphere Analyzer§f (10062), the §6Oxygen Vent§f (chain), and every §6planetary mission§f beyond §6Earth-like worlds§f. It is also required for the §6Space Station§f (10035) because stations are in vacuum by default.

§cWarning§f: The §6Space Suit Chest-Piece§f consumes §6monopropellant fuel§f from the internal fuel tank as oxygen. Always refill at a §6Gas Charge Pad§f before departing for vacuum destinations — running out of oxygen in vacuum is instant death.
